Block.description: Defines a named section for template inheritance. Child templates can override the content.

Variable.description: Outputs a variable value from the template context.

Extends.description: Specifies the parent template for inheritance.

Include.description: Includes another template in place. Useful for sharing partials across templates.

Include Ignore Missing.description: Includes a template without throwing an error if it does not exist.

Filter.description: Applies a filter to the contents of the block.

For Else.description: Iterates with a fallback that renders when the collection is empty.

Async Each.description: Asynchronous version of the for loop. Requires a custom async template loader.

Async All.description: Renders all items in parallel while preserving order. Requires async filters or loaders.

If.description: Conditionally renders content based on a boolean expression.

If Else.description: Conditionally renders content with a fallback branch.

If Elif.description: Conditionally renders content with multiple branches.

Elif.description: Adds an alternate condition branch to an if block.

Else.description: Adds a fallback branch to an if block.

Set Block.description: Captures block content into a variable using block assignment.

Macro.description: Defines a reusable content block, similar to a function.

Import.description: Loads a template and exposes its exported values (macros and variables).

From Import.description: Imports specific values from a template into the current namespace.

From Import with Context.description: Imports specific values from a template with access to the current context.

Raw.description: Outputs content as plain text without parsing Nunjucks tags.

Verbatim.description: An alias for raw. Outputs content without parsing Nunjucks tags.

Call.description: Invokes a macro with the block content available via caller().

Super.description: Renders the parent block content inside a child override.

Comment.description: Inserts a comment that is stripped during rendering.

Alpine x-data.description: Declares an Alpine component scope and its reactive data.

Alpine x-data Block.description: Creates a wrapper div with Alpine reactive state.

Alpine x-show.description: Toggles element visibility based on a reactive expression.

Alpine x-model.description: Binds an input element to reactive data (two-way).

Alpine x-text.description: Sets element text content from a reactive expression.

Alpine x-html.description: Sets element inner HTML from a reactive expression.

Alpine :bind.description: Binds an HTML attribute to a reactive expression (x-bind shorthand).

Alpine :class.description: Conditionally applies a class based on a reactive expression.

Alpine @keydown.description: Listens for keyboard events with a key modifier.

Alpine x-for.description: Iterates over an array, rendering a template for each item.

Alpine x-if.description: Conditionally inserts elements into the DOM.

Alpine x-ref.description: Registers a reference to the element, accessible via $refs.

Alpine x-transition.description: Applies enter and leave transitions on x-show elements.

Alpine x-cloak.description: Hides the element until Alpine has initialized.

Alpine x-init.description: Runs an expression when the component initializes.

Alpine x-effect.description: Re-runs an expression when reactive dependencies change.

Alpine $store.description: Accesses a registered Alpine global store.

Alpine $refs.description: Accesses an element registered with x-ref.

Alpine $nextTick.description: Runs code after the DOM has reacted to data changes.

Alpine $watch.description: Watches a reactive property for changes.
